hooks.command: bash -lc 'n=session-start.sh; d=$PWD; while [ "$d" != / ]; do p="$d/.codex/hooks/$n"; [ -x "$p" ] && CCGS_ROOT="$d" exec "$p"; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; echo "missing CCGS hook: $n" >&2; exit 127'
hooks.statusMessage: Loading Codex Game Studios session context
